englishDefinitions: To edit a film so that a problem, mistake, or unwanted part is not shown.
persianTranslation: دورِ چیزی را در تدوین زدن
با برش‌های تدوینی از کنار چیزی رد شدن
examples: The editor had to cut around the mistake in the dialogue.
They cut around the bad camera movement.
You can cut around the error if you have enough coverage.
